bridge_info.not_in_bridge.text: This chat is not connected to a bridge.

bridge_join.text: Chat {channel} from {server} was connected to the bridge.

bridge_leave.text: Chat {channel} from {server} was disconnected from the bridge.

consent_body.text: This chat is connected to others. Your messages will be automatically forwarded to linked chats. If you edit or delete your message within 30 days of sending, it will automatically update or disappear in the other chats as well. Click "Accept" to agree to the forwarding and continue chatting. For more details, check the chat description or the pinned message.

deadtopic.enabled.text: Dead topic prevention enabled. Every 6 days of inactivity at midnight UTC the bot will send and delete a phantom message.

deadtopic.phantom_message.text: Phantom message to preserve the topic.

help.cmd_allow_bots.text: /allow-bots enable|disable — allow or block relay of bot messages

help.cmd_allow_bots_tg.text: /allow_bots enable|disable — allow or block relay of bot messages

help.cmd_atb.text: /atb <bridge_id> — attach this chat to a bridge (bot admins)

help.cmd_bridge.text: /bridge — info about the bridge and connected chats

help.cmd_deadchat.text: /deadchat <role> <hours> | disable — ping a role when chat is inactive (Discord only)

help.cmd_deadtopic.text: /deadtopic enable|disable — send a phantom message every 6 days of inactivity to keep the topic alive

help.cmd_force_leave.text: /force_leave <platform> <id> — make the bot leave a chat (bot admins)

help.cmd_lang.text: /lang <code> — set bot language (ru, uk, pl, en, es, pt)

help.cmd_list_chats.text: /list_chats — list all chats the bot is in (bot admins)

help.cmd_loc_reply.text: /loc-reply <code> <text> — reply to a localization suggestion (bot admins)

help.cmd_locale.text: /locale [code] — localization status, or a language's file

help.cmd_newschat.text: /newschat add <emoji> | disable — auto-react to messages in a news channel (Discord only)

help.cmd_poll.text: /poll <text> <time> <options> — anonymous poll across all bridge chats

help.cmd_remindrules.text: /remindrules <time> [messages] — periodically post rules to all bridge chats (e.g.: 2h, 30m)

help.cmd_rfb.text: /rfb — remove this chat from the bridge

help.cmd_webhooks.text: /webhooks enable|disable — show relayed messages as webhooks (sender avatar and name)

help.cmd_whois.text: /whois — info about the message author (reply to a bot relay message)

loc_compare_not_found.text: No reply with code `{key}` was found in the localizations.

loc_cooldown.text: This file was requested recently. Try again later (at most once every 10 minutes per server/group).

loc_list_footer.text: Send /locale <code> to get the localization file.

loc_list_header.text: Available localization languages (🟩 unverified, 🟧 ununverified, 🟥 untranslated):

loc_reply_failed.text: Could not send a direct message to the user (their DMs may be closed).

loc_reply_not_found.text: No message with code {code} was found.

loc_reply_sent.text: The reply has been sent to the user.

loc_suggest_confirm.text: Thanks! Your suggestion has been sent. Your message code: {code}

loc_suggest_no_support.text: The support channel is not configured. Contact the bot administrator.

no_permission.text: You don't have permission to use this command.

poll_duration_invalid.text: Invalid time format. Examples: 1h, 2d, 1m. Maximum is 30 days.

poll_not_in_bridge.text: This chat is not part of any bridge.

poll_not_verified.text: Only verified users (who consented to message forwarding) can vote.

service_event.daily_auto_removed_bridge.text: Bridge {bridge_id} was deleted from the database because no chats remained.

service_event.daily_auto_removed_chat.text: Auto-removed from bridge: chat {chat_key} ({platform}) was inaccessible for over 24 hours.

service_event.daily_no_dc_manage_perm.text: Missing manage_messages permission in Discord chat {chat_key}.

service_event.daily_no_tg_delete_perm.text: Missing permission to delete messages in Telegram chat {chat_key}.

service_event.daily_tg_perm_check_error.text: Error checking permissions in Telegram chat {chat_key}: {error}

setadmin_bridge_dm.text: You have been made an administrator of bridge #{bridge_id}.

setadmin_bridge_done.text: User {user_id} has been made a bridge admin.

webhooks_disabled.text: Relayed messages in this channel will again appear as regular bot messages.

webhooks_enabled.text: Relayed messages in this channel will now appear as webhook messages — with the sender's avatar and name.

webhooks_thread_error.text: Webhooks don't work in threads or forum posts. Use this command in a regular text channel.

whois.not_verified.text: This command is only available to verified users. Send /verify to confirm consent to forwarding.

whois.origin_missing.text: Origin entry is missing in the database.

whois.origin_not_found.text: Could not find the origin for that message.

whois.origin_not_telegram.text: Origin is not Telegram; use /whois on the corresponding platform.

whois.use_context_menu.text: Slash commands cannot detect the replied message. Use the context menu instead: right-click the relay message → Apps → whois.

whois.use_reply.text: Use this command in reply to a bot relay message.
